name: Hlomla Moosa Magopeni
title: Full-Stack Developer
bio: Application Development student at CPUT building real-world full-stack solutions — from ride-hailing kiosks to student marketplaces — using Java, JavaScript, and MySQL.
aboutBio: I'm Hlomla Moosa Magopeni, a 3rd-year Diploma in ICT Application Development student at CPUT. I build full-stack applications that solve real community problems — from helping people request rides safely without a smartphone, to streamlining clinic bookings for students on campus. I work across the full stack: designing front-end interfaces, writing back-end logic, and integrating relational databases. I thrive in agile teams, take quality seriously, and write code that's clean and maintainable. Currently seeking a Work Integrated Learning (WIL) opportunity as a Full-Stack Developer.
